mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, mobile, performance, performance_explanation, confirm_status, feedback_status FROM tb_employee_performance_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, task_id, employee_name, mobile, employee_no, project_department, position_name, performance, performance_explanation, confirm_status, feedback_status FROM tb_employee_performance_record
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT record_id, feedback_content, handle_opinion, handle_admin_name FROM tb_employee_performance_feedback WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND record_id IN
#{recordId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_employee_performance_record (task_id, employee_name, mobile, employee_no, project_department, position_name, performance, performance_explanation, confirm_status, feedback_status, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{record.taskId}, #{record.employeeName}, #{record.mobile}, #{record.employeeNo}, #{record.projectDepartment}, #{record.positionName}, #{record.performance}, #{record.performanceExplanation}, #{record.confirmStatus}, #{record.feedbackStatus}, #{record.isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_employee_performance_record SET performance = #{performance}, confirm_status = 'PENDING_SECOND_CONFIRM', feedback_status = 'HANDLED_ADJUSTED', last_adjust_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 AND confirm_status = 'FEEDBACK_SUBMITTED' AND feedback_status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE tb_employee_performance_feedback SET status = 'HANDLED_ADJUSTED', handle_opinion = #{handleOpinion}, handle_admin_id = #{handleAdminId}, handle_admin_name = #{handleAdminName}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE tb_employee_performance_feedback SET status = 'HANDLED_UNCHANGED', handle_opinion = #{handleOpinion}, handle_admin_id = #{handleAdminId}, handle_admin_name = #{handleAdminName}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE tb_employee_performance_record SET confirm_status = 'CONFIRMED', feedback_status = 'HANDLED_UNCHANGED', last_confirm_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 AND confirm_status = 'FEEDBACK_SUBMITTED' AND feedback_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_employee_performance_adjust_log (task_id, record_id, mobile, before_performance, after_performance, adjust_reason, operator_admin_id, operator_admin_name, operator_mobile, ip_address) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{recordId}, #{mobile}, #{beforePerformance}, #{afterPerformance}, #{adjustReason}, #{operatorAdminId}, #{operatorAdminName}, #{operatorMobile}, #{ipAddress})
